sql: SELECT 'cover' AS k, CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT) AS bucket, SUM(ok) AS n_ok, SUM(has_socials) AS socials, SUM(has_image) AS img, NULL AS tot_net, NULL AS avg_net FROM token_metadata UNION ALL SELECT 'rug', (tm.has_socials || '/' || tm.has_image) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, NULL, NULL, ROUND(SUM(ct.net_sol),3), ROUND(AVG(ct.net_sol),4) FROM copy_trades ct JOIN token_metadata tm ON tm.mint=ct.mint WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL AND tm.ok=1 GROUP BY tm.has_socials, tm.has_image ORDER BY 1,2
